name: audit-appointment-radar
description: Monitor Korean listed companies' external auditor history, expected auditor-change timing, executive disclosures, audit fee/time data, and public auditor appointment notices using OpenDART.

interface.shortDescription: Check auditor history, rotation timing, executives, and auditor appointment notices.
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin for external-auditor appointment monitoring. It uses OpenDART public disclosures for listed companies to summarize the current auditor, recent auditor history, estimated auditor replacement or reappointment review timing, audit service fee/time including hourly fee, executive disclosures, and whether auditor tender or appointment notices are currently identifiable from public disclosures.
defaultPrompt: 상장사명으로 현재 감사인과 감사인 이력을 조회해줘.
OpenDART 기반 감사인 교체 예상시기와 남은 기간을 정리해줘.
임원 현황과 감사용역 보수·시간당 보수를 보여줘.
현재 외부감사인 입찰 또는 선임 공고가 있는지 확인해줘.
